boot.title: PETANQUE MASTER
tips: Hold TAB to see the ball ranking.
The Lob stops the ball dead. Perfect near the Jack!
The Iron Shot moves opponent balls, but requires precision.
The Half-Lob is versatile. A great choice for beginners!
The Tournament of Four: 3 matches, 4 legends of the court.
A Carreau is when your ball lands exactly where the other one was.
Pétanque was born in La Ciotat in 1907. "Pieds tanqués": play with feet anchored to the ground.
The Fanny: losing 13-0 without scoring a single point. Tradition is merciless.
On sand, balls stop quickly. Put a bit more power into your throw!
The Docks walls bounce balls back. Watch out for unexpected rebounds!
The Hill slopes. Compensate your throws upward to stay on target.
The best pointers often aim at a mark on the ground, not the Jack itself.
Each court has its own ambient soundtrack. Listen to the court come alive.
A well-executed Iron Shot can achieve a Carreau: the ball takes the exact place of the opponent's.

tutorial.goal: Throw your balls as close as possible to the Jack (the small ball) to score!
tutorial.aim: Swipe down to aim, release to throw!
tutorial.aim_sub: The further you pull, the faster the ball goes.
tutorial.loft_tir_note: The Iron Shot appears when the opponent has balls on the court.
tutorial.plombee_unlock:
High arc, the ball stops quickly.
Unlike the Half-Lob which rolls far,
the Lob lands and brakes hard.
tutorial.plombee_hint: LOB unlocked! High arc, less roll. Perfect near the jack.
tutorial.focus_desc: Press F to stabilize your aim. Less wobble, more precision!
tutorial.score_main:
Every ball closer to the Jack
than the opponent's best = 1 point!
tutorial.score_sub: First to 13 points wins the game.
tutorial.turn_rule: The team furthest from the Jack always plays next.
tutorial.turn_rule_sub: You're winning? It's the opponent's turn!
tutorial.welcome_line2: I'll show you the basics. It's simple: throw your ball as close to the jack as you can!
tutorial.welcome_line3: Let's go. See that little golden ball over there? That's the jack!
tutorial.cochonnet_hint: The little golden ball is the jack. Aim for it!
tutorial.strategy_hint: Point = place near the jack. Shoot [3] = knock the opponent's ball away!
tutorial.retro_hint: Too far? Hold [R] for backspin: the ball brakes on landing.
tutorial.ability_hint: Press [C] to activate your special ability!
tutorial.tab_hint: Press [TAB] to see each ball's distance.
tutorial.encourage_first_mene: Not bad for a first try! Keep it up.
tutorial.page1_desc:
Place your balls as close as possible to the jack
(the small golden ball).
tutorial.page2_desc:
Swipe from the throw circle towards your target.
The further you swipe, the further the ball goes.
Swipe direction determines the trajectory.
tutorial.page3_plombee_desc: The ball flies high and stops short.
tutorial.page3_tir_desc: Direct hit on an opponent's ball.
tutorial.page4_desc:
After each round:
- Count your balls closer to the jack
  than the opponent's best ball.
- Each close ball = 1 point.
- First to 13 points wins!
tutorial.page5_focus_desc:
Stabilizes aim (-80% wobble).
You have 5 charges per match.
tutorial.page5_retro_desc:
Activates backspin to brake
the ball after landing.
tutorial.page5_ability_desc:
Your character's unique power.
Use it at the right moment!
tutorial.page5_tab_desc:
View ball rankings
and distances in real time.

advice.too_long: Your balls often went too far. Try the plombee — it stops on impact!
advice.no_tir: Shooting can displace opponent balls when they lead. Try the tir au fer!
advice.low_precision: Aim closer to the jack. The Half-Lob is your best friend!
advice.no_carreau: A carreau takes the exact spot of an opponent ball. Go for precise shots!
advice.pressure_loss: Under pressure (10-10+), aiming wobbles. Use Focus [F] to steady your aim!
advice.general: Every terrain has its tricks. Adapt your throw style to the surface!

ingame.hint_sand: Sand slows balls down. Throw harder!
ingame.hint_mixed: Watch the zones! Grass = slow, gravel = fast.
ingame.hint_slope: Sloped terrain! Aim higher to compensate.

shop.controls_hint: Arrows Navigate     Enter Buy     1-3 Tabs     Esc Back

terrain_hints.colline: ⛰️ Watch out: this court slopes! Balls roll downhill.
terrain_hints.docks: 🧱 Metal edges bounce balls back. Use the rebounds!
terrain_hints.plage: 🏖️ Sand slows balls quickly. Throw with more power!
terrain_hints.parc: 🌿 Mixed zones: grass (slow) and gravel (fast). Aim strategically.

overworld.blocked_exit: You can't go that way yet.
overworld.gate_locked: You need to beat the Arena Master first to continue!

arcade.title: ARCADE MODE
arcade.subtitle: The Tournament of La Ciotat
arcade.galet_explain:
Challenges earn you Pebbles.
Spend them at the Shop between matches!

feedback.title: Your feedback matters!
